ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school" TEXT /* Name of the school the student attends */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size (GT3: greater than 3, LE3: less than or equal to 3) */,
  "Pstatus" TEXT /* Status of the student's parents (T: living together, A: apart) */,
  "Medu" INTEGER /* Mother's education level (numeric: 0-4) */,
  "Fedu" INTEGER /* Father's education level (numeric: 0-4) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the student */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken at home */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the student */,
  "eligibility_free_lunch" TEXT /* Eligibility for free or reduced-price lunch */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* Parental education description */,
  "parental_occupation" TEXT /* Parental occupation */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Family income level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school FOREIGN KEY ("school") REFERENCES schools ("school_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "math_score" INTEGER /* Score in Mathematics */,
  "reading_score" INTEGER /* Score in Reading */,
  "writing_score" INTEGER /* Score in Writing */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester or term of the performance data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the performance data */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_factors" (
  "socioeconomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for socioeconomic data record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "guardian" TEXT /* Guardian of the student */,
  "traveltime" INTEGER /* Travel time to school (numeric: 1-4) */,
  "studytime" INTEGER /* Study time per week (numeric: 1-4) */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual family income */,
  "parental_support" TEXT /* Level of parental support (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "neighborhood_safety" TEXT /* Safety of the student's neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the socioeconomic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the socioeconomic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socioeconomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_factors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_factors" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for behavioral record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of past class failures */,
  "schoolsup" TEXT /* Whether the student receives school support (yes/no) */,
  "famsup" TEXT /* Whether the student receives family support (yes/no) */,
  "behavioral_issues" TEXT /* Specific behavioral issues (e.g., bullying, truancy) */,
  "counseling_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of counseling sessions attended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the behavioral record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the behavioral record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_factors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for activities record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Participation in extracurricular activities (yes/no) */,
  "nursery" TEXT /* Attended nursery school (yes/no) */,
  "higher" TEXT /* Plans to pursue higher education (yes/no) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of extracurricular activity (e.g., sports, arts) */,
  "activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of participation in the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activities record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the activities record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurricular_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_status" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for health record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health status (numeric: 1-5) */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of school absences */,
  "chronic_conditions" TEXT /* Chronic health conditions (if any) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the health record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_status_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for status record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student ID */,
  "passed" TEXT /* Pass status (yes/no) */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_status_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the school record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
